common.paceRequiredHint: Required for running, cycling and swimming

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in or create an account

auth.chooseProfile: Choose your profile and enter your information
auth.successCheckSpam: Check your spam folder if you don't see the email.
auth.resetInstructions: Enter your email to receive a reset link

errors.passwordRequirements: Password must contain at least 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase and one number.
errors.accountCreated: Account created successfully. Check your email to confirm.
errors.passwordMinLength: Password must contain at least 6 characters.
errors.resetLinkSent: Reset link sent. Check your email.
errors.resetLinkSentLong: A reset link has been sent to your email address.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many email requests sent. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
errors.userExists: An account already exists with this email.
errors.accountCreatedSuccess: Account created successfully! Please check your email to confirm your account, then log in.
errors.confirmationEmailResent: A new confirmation email has been sent to {email}. Please check your inbox.
errors.signupGenericError: An error occurred while creating your account.
errors.accountExistsLoginMessage: An account already exists with this email. Log in with your password.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Your email address has not been confirmed yet. You should have received a confirmation email—please check your inbox (and spam folder). If you didn't receive it, you can request a new one by going through the sign-up process again (sign up again with the same email address).
errors.sessionExpiredReset: Session expired. Please start the reset process again.
errors.passwordUpdatedSuccess: Password updated successfully. You will be connected automatically.

adminDesignSystem.intro: Reference for tokens and components. Priority: use these tokens instead of hardcoded hex colors.

palette.title: Color palette
palette.danger: Destructive actions — logout, delete, error states

button.title: Button component
button.description: Variants aligned with existing app buttons: Create account, Save (workout modal), Log in, Log out.

inputs.title: Input / Textarea components
inputs.description: Form fields aligned with LoginForm, ProfileForm, WorkoutModal.

typography.title: Typography
typography.description: Inventory of current text styles, where they are used, and the recommendation: keep or replace.

badge.title: Badge component
badge.description: Labels for sports, languages, goals, statuses. Variants: default, primary, sport-*, success, warning.

activityTile.title: ActivityTile component
activityTile.description: Unified activity tiles for planned workouts, imported Strava activities, and race goals.

tileCard.title: TileCard component
tileCard.description: Container with the same border style as the “Day activities” modal tiles.

personTiles.title: Coach and Athlete tiles (CoachTile / AthleteTile)
personTiles.description: Unified list tiles: card, header (avatar + name), sport badges, content area, action footer.

modal.title: Modal component
modal.description: Reusable modals with overlay, Escape handling, multiple sizes (sm to 4xl), icon support, footer, and alignments.

languageSwitcher.title: LanguageSwitcher component
languageSwitcher.description: Language switch dropdown (FR/EN) with a globe icon.

chat.title: Chat components (coach overlay)
chat.description: ChatAthleteListItem and ChatConversationSidebar: components used in the coach chat overlay.

titles.hero: A coach, a plan, real results

misc.bio: Specialized in running/trail. Progress without getting injured.
misc.lead: Plan, track, improve — with a coach.

members.title: Member management
members.description: List of all members and role modification.

metadata.loginDescription: Log in to your My Sport Ally account to access your workouts and track your performance.
metadata.dashboardDescription: Manage your workouts, goals and coach

hero.title: Reach your goals with a
hero.subtitle: Personalized training plans, real-time tracking, Strava sync and direct messaging. Everything you need to progress effectively.

preview.title: An intuitive and comprehensive interface
preview.subtitle: Access all your workouts, goals and exchanges from a modern dashboard

features.title: Everything you need to progress
features.subtitle: A comprehensive platform that brings together athletes and professional coaches

personalizedPlanning.title: Personalized Planning
personalizedPlanning.description: Weekly training calendar with detailed sessions: duration, distance, elevation and target pace for each sport.

stravaConnection.title: Strava Connection
stravaConnection.description: Automatically sync your Strava activities. View your actual vs planned workouts and track your weekly totals.

directMessaging.title: Direct Messaging
directMessaging.description: Real-time chat with your coach. Ask questions, share your feelings and adjust your program anytime.

goalsManagement.title: Goals Management
goalsManagement.description: Set your target races and events. Your coach adapts your preparation with a countdown to your main goal.

progressTracking.title: Progress Tracking
progressTracking.description: Weekly totals by sport, session history and comparison with your plan to measure your progress.

certifiedCoaches.title: Certified Coaches
certifiedCoaches.description: Browse detailed profiles, check athlete reviews and ratings, and choose the coach that matches your needs.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to start your sports transformation

step1.title: Create your profile
step1.description: Enter your practiced sports, level and goals in just a few clicks.

step2.title: Find your coach
step2.description: Filter by sport and language, browse profiles and send a coaching request.

step3.title: Start progressing
step3.description: Receive your personalized plan, communicate with your coach and reach your goals.

features.manageAthletes: Manage all your athletes from one place
features.manageOffers: Create and manage your coaching offers
features.receiveReviews: Receive reviews to build your reputation

cta.title: Ready to take it to the next level?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of athletes who progress every day with My Sport Ally

deleteModal.title: Delete offer
deleteModal.message: Do you want to delete the offer "{title}"? This action is immediate and irreversible.

unsavedChangesModal.message: You have unsaved changes. What would you like to do?

validation.priceRequired: The price for offer {number} is required for this price type.
validation.priceInvalid: The price for offer {number} is invalid.
validation.onlyOneFeatured: Only one offer can be featured.
validation.displayOrderConflict: This slot is already in use. Please refresh the page and try again.
validation.offerSlotRequired: Please fill in the title, description and select a recurrence for this offer.
validation.offerSlotEmpty: Fill in at least one field to save this offer.
validation.offerNotFound: This offer does not exist or does not belong to this coach.
validation.publishFieldsRequired: Please fill in all 6 fields (FR/EN titles, FR/EN descriptions, price and recurrence) to publish.

publishModal.title: Publish offer
publishModal.message: Do you confirm that everything is correct? Once the offer is published, the price will not be editable and you will not be able to change what is included at that price. You will only be able to fix typos in the title and description.

savePublishedModal.title: Editing a published offer
savePublishedModal.message: You cannot make structural changes to the offer (price, type). If you want to change the price or structure, archive this offer and create a new one. Only title and description changes will be saved.

archiveModal.title: Archive offer
archiveModal.message: New athletes will no longer be able to subscribe to this offer. Athletes who already have this offer will still have access. You must honour the offer until you have ended it with the athlete.

completeProfilePrompt.title: Make yourself known to athletes
completeProfilePrompt.description: Complete your profile to appear in their searches and receive your first coaching requests.

publishOfferPrompt.title: Make your coaching visible
publishOfferPrompt.description: Publish at least one offer so athletes can send you a request from "Find a coach".

pendingRequests.title: Pending requests
pendingRequests.description: Accept or decline requests from athletes who want you as their coach.

noAthletes.title: Your coaching requests will appear on this page.
noAthletes.description: Athletes who choose you will appear here. You can accept or decline them.
